reviews.comment:
Muy pocas ganas de trabajar, tuve que asistir obligatoriamente para sacar el registro internacional de conducir. No me pude comunicar por teléfono para sacar el turno, y cuando me presente me mandaban a sacar un turno por teléfono, me fui desde san martin y en la puerta me dijeron que me daban un turno para el mismo día dentro de 4 5 horas. Supuestamente estaban completos, pero vi 2 personas entrar. Pongo 3 estrellas porque la que me atendió en el mostrador fue muy amable, lo único rescatable

(Translated by Google)
I had very little motivation to work, but I had to go in to get my international driver's license. I couldn't get through by phone to make an appointment, and when I arrived, they told me to make one by phone. I traveled from San Martín, and at the door, they told me they could give me an appointment for the same day in 4-5 hours. They were supposedly full, but I saw two people go in. I'm giving it 3 stars because the woman who helped me at the counter was very friendly; that's the only positive thing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2bTZtYTF3RRAB
